tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: Login, logout, refresh, password recovery, and session management.

tags.name: Organizations
tags.description: Create and manage Organization aggregates belonging to Tenants. An Organization is the operational container for future ERP, CRM, HRM, Accounting, and Commerce modules.

tags.name: Users
tags.description: Manage tenant-scoped platform users. Every operation requires tenantId.

tags.name: Organization Memberships
tags.description: Manage memberships (invitations) for an Organization. Every endpoint is tenant-scoped via the required tenantId query parameter.

get.description: Returns a user only when it belongs to the requested tenant.

put.description: Updates email and display name within the tenant scope.

get.description: Fetch a single Organization scoped to a specific Tenant. The tenantId query parameter is required. If the (tenantId, id) pair does not match any Organization, a 404 is returned.

400.description: Bad Request - missing required tenantId query parameter

404.description: Organization Not Found - no Organization with the given id exists under the given tenant

put.summary: Update an Organization's name and description
put.description: Updates the mutable fields of an Organization. The tenant relationship and status are NOT changed. If the new name conflicts with another organization under the same tenant, a 409 Conflict is returned.

400.description: Bad Request - request body failed validation or tenantId missing

404.description: Organization Not Found - no Organization with the given id exists under this tenant

409.description: Organization Already Exists - another organization under the same tenant already uses the new name

get.description: Lists users belonging only to the requested tenant.

post.description: Creates a tenant-scoped user. Default status is INVITED.

get.description: Returns all Organizations belonging to the specified Tenant. The tenantId query parameter is required. If the tenant has no organizations, an empty array is returned.

400.description: Bad Request - missing required tenantId query parameter

post.description: Registers a new Organization under an existing Tenant. The Organization is created with status ACTIVE. The (tenantId, name) pair must be unique; otherwise a 409 is returned.

Location.description: URI of the newly created Organization resource

400.description: Bad Request - request body failed validation (missing tenantId, blank name, name or description too long)

404.description: Tenant Not Found - the referenced tenantId does not exist

409.description: Organization Already Exists - an Organization with the same name already exists under the same Tenant

get.summary: List all memberships for an organization

post.summary: Invite a member to an organization
post.description: Creates a new membership with status INVITED. The (tenantId, organizationId, email) tuple must be unique.

400.description: Bad Request - validation failed or missing tenantId

409.description: Membership already exists for this email

post.summary: Set a new password using a valid single-use reset token
Create an account with regional mobile contact and send a password setup link
Revoke all active refresh tokens for the authenticated user
Authenticate and return access data to the trusted BFF
Request a single-use reset link. Always returns 200 to prevent account enumeration.
Rotate the authenticated account credential and terminate refresh sessions
Send an administrator-issued, single-use set-password link

patch.description: Sets the user status to SUSPENDED.
Sets the user status to INACTIVE.
Sets the user status to ARCHIVED.
Sets the user status to ACTIVE.

patch.summary: Remove a membership (soft delete, status = REMOVED)

patch.description: Sets the Organization status to INACTIVE. Idempotent: deactivating an already-INACTIVE organization is a no-op that returns the current state.

400.description: Bad Request - missing required tenantId query parameter

patch.description: Marks the Organization as ARCHIVED without removing it from the database. Idempotent: archiving an already-archived organization is a no-op that returns the current state. Use this instead of a DELETE endpoint to preserve audit history.

200.description: Organization archived successfully (or was already archived)

400.description: Bad Request - missing required tenantId query parameter

patch.description: Sets the Organization status to ACTIVE. Idempotent: activating an already-ACTIVE organization is a no-op that returns the current state.

400.description: Bad Request - missing required tenantId query parameter

get.summary: Get the authenticated user's identity, memberships, and role grants
